title: Il Telefono e i Social
scenario: You're chatting with your Italian friend about phones and social media.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.english: Do you have a new phone?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì! L'ho comprato la settimana scorsa.
lines.english: Yes! I bought it last week.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.english: Nice! Do you use social media?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Sì, uso il telefono tutti i giorni.
lines.english: Yes, I use the phone every day.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.english: What do you do with the phone?

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Mando messaggi, scatto foto e ascolto musica.
lines.english: I send messages, take photos and listen to music.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.italian: Anch'io! Guardo anche video e gioco.
lines.english: Me too! I also watch videos and play games.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Quante ore al giorno usi il telefono?
lines.english: How many hours a day do you use the phone?

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.english: About three hours. Maybe too much!

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Mia madre dice che uso il telefono troppo.
lines.english: My mother says I use the phone too much.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.italian: Anche mio padre! Dice che devo leggere libri.
lines.english: My father too! He says I must read books.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.italian: Sì, lo uso per i compiti di scuola.
lines.english: Yes, I use it for school homework.

lines.speaker: you
lines.italian: Io preferisco il telefono. È più facile.
lines.english: I prefer the phone. It's easier.

lines.speaker: sofia
lines.italian: Hai ragione! Il telefono è molto utile.
lines.english: You're right! The phone is very useful.

practicePrompts.prompt: How would you say you listen to music every day?
How would you ask how many hours someone uses the phone?
How would you say you prefer the computer?
